data.body:
PASS 1 review — criterion T10 (Infrastructure / IaC, overlay): NOT APPLICABLE / PASS.

This is a documentation-only ticket ("This is documentation only — no behavior changes"). It provisions no cloud resources and authors no IaC (Terraform/CloudFormation/CDK/Pulumi/Ansible) or Kubernetes/Helm. None of T10's binary checks (remote state, IAM least-privilege, idempotency/drift, blast radius, secrets, cost/sizing, observability) engage. Per the overlay's ANTI-FP rule, T10 is not-applicable for non-infra tickets.

Affirmations: T10 — not-applicable (no infrastructure provisioning or configuration in scope).

No T10 findings.
